---
name: apple-review
description: App Store review submission and rejection recovery. Use when an app is rejected, needs metadata improvements, or requires guideline compliance checks.
---

# Apple Review

Guidance for passing App Store Review and recovering from rejections.

## Common Rejection Reasons

- Guideline 4.0: Design — UI does not follow Human Interface Guidelines
- Guideline 2.1: Performance — crashes or bugs
- Guideline 5.1.1: Privacy — missing usage description keys

## Review Response Strategy

When rejected, respond through App Store Connect within 24 hours.

### Writing an Appeal

Be concise, reference the specific guideline, and attach screenshots if needed.

## Metadata Tips

Ensure your app description accurately reflects current functionality.
